headline: Assessing LKQ (LKQ) Valuation After Artisan Mid Cap Value Fund’s Exit And Softer Growth Expectations
summary: Artisan Mid Cap Value Fund’s decision to sell LKQ (LKQ) shares, citing low valuation and softer expectations for repairable vehicle claims, has put fresh attention on how investors are approaching the stock today. See our latest analysis for LKQ. At a share price of US$28.19, LKQ has seen a 10.42% 1 month share price decline and a 6.13% year to date share price decline. The 1 year total shareholder return of 29.18% and 3 year total shareholder return of 43.40% point to fading momentum as...
